channel.title: ID Churn Sentinel — reviewed changes to US transgender ID-document sources — NC
channel.description: Human-reviewed changes detected at official US state and federal pages governing name and gender-marker changes on identity documents. Each item cites the official source URL and the passage that changed. This feed reports that a source changed; it does not assert what the law is. This feed is scoped to NC ONLY: it says nothing about any other jurisdiction, and its silence about NC is not evidence that nothing changed there.
